mapper.sql: id, title, total_score, created_time, updated_time, is_deleted, timer_mode, total_seconds, auto_submit, allow_pause
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO listening_test ( title, total_score, created_time, updated_time, is_deleted, timer_mode, total_seconds, auto_submit, allow_pause ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{totalScore}, #{createdTime}, #{updatedTime}, #{isDeleted}, #{timerMode}, #{totalSeconds}, #{autoSubmit}, #{allowPause} )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM listening_test WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM listening_test WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM listening_test WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT FROM listening_test WHERE is_deleted = 1 ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT FROM listening_test ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE listening_test SET title = #{title}, total_score = #{totalScore}, updated_time = #{updatedTime}, timer_mode = #{timerMode}, total_seconds = #{totalSeconds}, auto_submit = #{autoSubmit}, allow_pause = #{allowPause} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE listening_test SET is_deleted = 1, updated_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE listening_test SET is_deleted = 0, updated_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 1
